title: Everyday Object Evolution Grid

imagePrompts.prompt: 2x2 grid, 1080x1080, do this for 4 everyday objects: object_evolution_content =  ( chrono_isometric_frieze_of_ceramic fox mascot_from_ancient_to_modern_with_patent_years * 1.7 ) + ( material_innovation_stepping_stones_that_changed_ceramic fox mascot_forever * 1.5 ) + ( cross_section_of_a_classic_version_of_ceramic fox mascot_with_mechanism_reveal * 1.4 ) + ( user_need_map_what_problem_ceramic fox mascot_solved_in_each_era * 1.3 ) + ( future_concept_renders_of_ceramic fox mascot_based_on_nanotech_sustainability_ai * 1.1 ) + ( manufacturing_process_then_vs_now_split_screen_for_ceramic fox mascot * 1.2 ) + ( collectible_variants_and_cultural_design_icons_of_ceramic fox mascot_museum_style_layout * 1.0 ) + ( disposal_and_recycling_challenge_diagram_closing_the_loop_on_ceramic fox mascot * 0.9 ) - ( dull_antique_photos_without_visual_flow / 3.0 ) - ( ignoring_non_western_invention_of_ceramic fox mascot_if_applicable / 3.4 ) - ( overly_academic_timelines_without_human_stories / 2.7 )
